mapper.select: SELECT USE_STPLAT_ID, USE_STPLAT_NM, USE_STPLAT_CN, INFO_PROVD_AGRE_CN, TO_CHAR(FRST_REGIST_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') FRST_REGIST_PNTTM , FRST_REGISTER_ID, TO_CHAR(LAST_UPDT_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') LAST_UPDT_PNTTM , LAST_UPDUSR_ID, VER, APLC_DE, REPRSNT_AT FROM TB_STPLAT_INFO WHERE USE_STPLAT_ID=#{useStplatId}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT USE_STPLAT_ID, USE_STPLAT_NM, USE_STPLAT_CN, INFO_PROVD_AGRE_CN, TO_CHAR(FRST_REGIST_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') FRST_REGIST_PNTTM, FRST_REGISTER_ID, TO_CHAR(LAST_UPDT_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') LAST_UPDT_PNTTM, LAST_UPDUSR_ID, VER, APLC_DE, REPRSNT_AT FROM TB_STPLAT_INFO WHERE REPRSNT_AT = 'Y' ORDER BY APLC_DE DESC, USE_STPLAT_ID DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 1

SELECT USE_STPLAT_ID, USE_STPLAT_NM, USE_STPLAT_CN, INFO_PROVD_AGRE_CN, TO_CHAR(FRST_REGIST_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') FRST_REGIST_PNTTM, FRST_REGISTER_ID, TO_CHAR(LAST_UPDT_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') LAST_UPDT_PNTTM, LAST_UPDUSR_ID, VER, APLC_DE, REPRSNT_AT FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM RNUM,STP.* FROM ( SELECT USE_STPLAT_ID, USE_STPLAT_NM, USE_STPLAT_CN, INFO_PROVD_AGRE_CN, FRST_REGIST_PNTTM , FRST_REGISTER_ID, LAST_UPDT_PNTTM , LAST_UPDUSR_ID, VER, APLC_DE, REPRSNT_AT FROM TB_STPLAT_INFO WHERE 1=1
AND USE_STPLAT_NM LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%'
AND USE_STPLAT_CN LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%'
ORDER BY USE_STPLAT_NM DESC ) STP ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #{recordCountPerPage} and RNUM > #{firstIndex}

SELECT COUNT(*) totcnt FROM TB_STPLAT_INFO WHERE 1=1
AND RECOMEND_SITE_NM LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%'
AND RECOMEND_SITE_URL LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_STPLAT_INFO (USE_STPLAT_ID , USE_STPLAT_NM , USE_STPLAT_CN , INFO_PROVD_AGRE_CN , FRST_REGIST_PNTTM , FRST_REGISTER_ID , LAST_UPDT_PNTTM , LAST_UPDUSR_ID , VER , APLC_DE , REPRSNT_AT) VALUES ( #{useStplatId} , #{useStplatNm} , #useStplatCn:CLOB# , #infoProvdAgreCn:CLOB# , sysdate , #{frstRegisterId} , sysdate , #{lastUpdusrId} , #{ver} , #{aplcDe} , #{reprsntAt} )
